_note: Fill 'devs' with each developer's Teams display name (exactly as it shows in Teams search). 'messages' are rotated so the reminder does not look identical every time.
messages: Hi, this is Napco Nucleus. Please add me to your client calls and chats so I can capture the requirements for you automatically. Thanks!
Reminder from Napco Nucleus: add me to your meetings and I will take care of capturing everything discussed. Thank you.
Hello from Napco Nucleus. Quick reminder to add me to your client conversations so nothing a client asks for gets missed.
